allow: Bash(mkdir -p "app/\(main\)/interviews/[slug]" "app/\(main\)/about" "app/\(main\)/insights" "app/\(main\)/apply" "app/admin/login" "app/admin/applications" "app/admin/interviews" "app/admin/interviews/new" "app/admin/interviews/[id]" "app/api/auth" "app/api/applications" "app/api/interviews" "app/api/admin/applications" "app/api/admin/interviews" components/ui components/layout components/admin lib prisma public/images styles scripts)
Bash(zsh -l -c 'PORT=3210 nohup npm run dev > /tmp/db_dev.log 2>&1 & echo "started pid $!"')
Bash(zsh -l -c 'PORT=3210 nohup npm run dev > /tmp/db_dev2.log 2>&1 & echo "restarted pid $!"')
Bash(zsh -l -c "npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -E 'error TS' | head -20 || true")

Bash(zsh -l -c 'python3 -c "import pdfplumber; print\(\\"pdfplumber ok\\"\)" 2>/dev/null || python3 -c "import PyPDF2; print\(\\"PyPDF2 ok\\"\)" 2>/dev/null || python3 -c "import fitz; print\(\\"pymupdf ok\\"\)" 2>/dev/null || echo "none of pdfplumber/PyPDF2/pymupdf"; which pdftotext || echo "no pdftotext"')
Bash(zsh -l -c 'pip install --quiet pymupdf 2>&1 | tail -2; python3 -c "import fitz; print\(\\"pymupdf installed\\"\)" 2>&1 | tail -1')
Bash(zsh -l -c 'python3 -m pip install --quiet --user pymupdf 2>&1 | tail -3; python3 -c "import fitz; print\(\\"ok\\"\)" 2>&1 | tail -1')
Bash(zsh -l -c 'npx prisma migrate dev --name add_blog_post 2>&1 | tail -20')
